Lepusa native shell

MoonDesk

A contained Lepusa manifest for proving the next native desktop shell without replacing the current MoonDesk runtime.

01

Book Workspace

Keep MoonBook files, wiki pages, sessions, and app tools owned by the book.

02

Agent Runtime

Let MoonClaw own execution while the shell handles review and operator control.

03

Native Shell

Use Lepusa for the WebView, bridge, permissions, bundle, and platform packaging.
